summary: Source identifiers, dates, titles, journal venues, registry IDs, and current registry status were checked against PubMed ESummary and ClinicalTrials.gov API metadata. The review does not certify full-text quantitative extraction.

findings.claim_or_issue: Core PubMed and ClinicalTrials.gov metadata match the source records added in this repair pass.
findings.why_it_matters: Stable source metadata is required before downstream extraction, review, and synthesis records can be audited.
findings.recommended_action: Keep source IDs and registry URLs stable; attach source_snapshot_id values to extraction-grade provenance as snapshots become available.

findings.claim_or_issue: Outcome/result records are conservative placeholders pending full endpoint-level extraction.
findings.why_it_matters: A living meta-analysis needs exact endpoints, effects, uncertainty, comparator definitions, and adverse events before quantitative synthesis.
findings.recommended_action: Run extraction_refresh before creating synthesis or certainty-assessment records.
